history.content:
Hey there! 👋 This is Bookly support following up on your order BK-1003. I know you received the wrong books — Spanish-language titles instead of your computer science textbooks. So sorry again about that mix-up.

I've got some good news. A specialist reviewed your case and because you're a valued Gold member, we'd like to offer you an immediate replacement of Introduction to Algorithms & The Art of Computer Programming with free expedited shipping so they arrive before your Monday class. Plus we'll take 15% off for the trouble — and you don't even need to send back the wrong books first.

If you'd still prefer a straight refund instead, totally understand and we can do that too. Just let me know what works best for you!

task.reason: Customer received wrong items — got two Spanish-language books (Viktor Frankl and Brian Weiss) instead of the ordered computer science textbooks (Introduction to Algorithms and The Art of Computer Programming).
task.summary: Customer received completely wrong books (Spanish-language titles instead of computer science textbooks) for order BK-1003 ($389.95). They need the books by Monday and are requesting a full refund since they can't wait for a replacement. Customer is a Gold loyalty member since March 2021 with $1,240 annual spend.
task.procedure: Given his loyalty status, offer an immediate replacement with 15% off, without waiting to receive the wrong items first. Include expedited shipping at no cost so the customer receives the correct books before their class. If the customer prefers a regular return instead, proceed without any pushback.

memory.summary: Customer received wrong items for order BK-1003 ($389.95) — got two Spanish-language books instead of computer science textbooks (Introduction to Algorithms & The Art of Computer Programming). Refund requested. Return initiated (RT-101) with human review flagged. Customer needs the books by Monday — urgency noted. Preferred follow-up: WhatsApp.
